reviews.author: Maria G.
reviews.text: Took my kids here for a birthday party and they didn't want to leave. The LED floor games are genuinely fun for adults too — Floor Is Lava got competitive fast.

reviews.author: Devon R.
reviews.text: The laser maze is the best I've tried in LA. Staff were friendly and reset the games quickly. Great location inside Glendale Galleria.

reviews.author: Anna K.
reviews.text: Really fun hour with friends. Button Matrix was our favorite. Only note: weekends get busy, book ahead.

reviews.author: James T.
reviews.text: Perfect for a team outing. We did Pixel Duel tournaments for two hours. Clean, modern, well run.

reviews.author: Sofia M.
reviews.text: My 7-year-old calls this the best place in the mall. The pixel floor reacts to every step — kids are mesmerized.

reviews.author: Leo P.
reviews.text: Swoosh Hoops is addictive. Came for 30 minutes, stayed for two hours. Will be back with the office crew.
